submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-12-matrix-same-group
on: workflow_dispatch
jobs:
  matrix-job:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    strategy:
      max-parallel: 1
      matrix:
        val: [1, 2, 3]
    concurrency:
      group: matrix-group-${{ matrix.val }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: run-cell
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=12-matrix val=${{ matrix.val }}"
          sleep 3
          echo "DONE=${{ matrix.val }}"
